---
title: "03 — Plot Follicle"
params:
  sample_id: "default"
  roi_id: "default"
  cell_id: "default"
  data_path: "."
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
execute:
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import os
import spatialdata
import spatialdata_plot
import session_info
from timer import timer, timing_summary

with timer("Setup"):
    sample_id = params["sample_id"]
    roi_id    = params["roi_id"]
    cell_id   = params["cell_id"]
    data_path = params["data_path"]
    # follicle zarr written by 02_subset_follicle for this cell
    zarr_path = os.path.join(data_path, roi_id, "02_subset_follicle", "output", f"{cell_id}.zarr")
```

## Load follicle SpatialData

Reads the follicle-level zarr store created by notebook 02 for this cell.

```{python}
with timer("Read zarr"):
    sdata = spatialdata.read_zarr(zarr_path)
sdata
```

## Available images

Lists all image elements present in the follicle zarr store. Xenium data typically
includes a morphology focus image and a maximum intensity projection.

```{python}
with timer("List images"):
    image_keys = list(sdata.images.keys())
print(f"Images: {image_keys}")
```

## Plot tissue images

Renders each image element overlaid on the tissue coordinate space.

```{python}
for img_key in image_keys:
    with timer(f"Plot {img_key}"):
        (
            sdata.pl
            .render_images(element=img_key)
            .pl.show(title=f"{sample_id} — {img_key}", figsize=(6, 6))
        )
```

## Timings

```{python}
timing_summary()
```

## Session Info

```{python}
session_info.show()
```
